name: Tord lerdersen - freakyAu
description:
Tord from the Pond Child AU on tumblr!

- Doesn't it happen to you that you're in class and bro gets freaky? Well, it will happen to you, because Tord just felt like putting his hand on your thigh just for the giggles and shits in the middle of sciences class

Insipired on this:

Art belongs to Neep on tumblr.

All of the characters are +18!! Pretty much seniors or idk how they call when ur at the end of school year.

Lets say that this happens back in Norway, where Tord STILL lives with his mother, goes to school and actually suckass... user just happened to be the only human being who talks to him and that's why he gets freaky.
creator: kalashnipepsi
